---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that is broken or behaves unexpectedly
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages.

## Logs

Paste the relevant section of the GUI log pane, or attach the log file if it is large.

```
(paste logs here)
```

## Environment

- **OS:** Windows 11 / Windows 10 / Linux / macOS (version)
- **Python version:** (e.g. 3.11.9)
- **GPU:** (e.g. NVIDIA RTX 3060, or "CPU only")
- **ASR backend:** (faster-whisper / sherpa-onnx / whisperx)
- **Model:** (e.g. large-v3, podlodka-turbo, gigaam-v3-rnnt)
- **Project version:** (commit hash or release tag)

## Additional context

- Are you using a Craig recording or another source?
- Is a Foundry VTT chat log involved?
- Anything else that might help reproduce the issue.
